strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple production environments
Full-stack capabilities spanning React, REST APIs, databases, and AWS infrastructure
Strong software craftsmanship focus with TDD, testing frameworks, and clean code practices
concerns: Significantly overqualified (Staff Engineer) for Junior/Mid-level position—high flight risk
No Nest.js experience; background emphasizes custom Node.js infrastructure
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned; prior projects feature MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: Technical stack alignment (TypeScript, React, REST APIs)

response.justification: Bogdan possesses exceptional technical depth well beyond the role's requirements, with strong TypeScript, full-stack, and software craftsmanship credentials. However, his Staff-level experience represents a critical misalignment: he would be substantially underutilized in a Junior/Mid-level IC position, creating high retention risk. Technically excellent but organizationally overqualified.
